title: Just-In NETHER
description: Enhance the NETHER adventure experience ,and the addition of entirely new species.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62775b5790998bf1d74a0c2129d389ca081bca3e.png)
A new species, **Bullkin**, has been added. Like piglins, they are born in the Nether and have a fondness for gold. The two tribes often engage in fierce battles over gold.

<details>
<summary>Bullkins</summary>

![Bullkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0faa48656954a06b9ee54ee14fae405db8f3c61.png)             ![Bullkin Brute](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aa0a961da623ada5b7177ab9a445c9a374d508c.png)      ![Zombiefied Bullkin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0096a614208c778e1fb8b18737f6ddf62976c7b3.png)

</details>

Two new bosses, representing the Piglin and Bullkin factions, will lead their respective armies into battle. However, you are their common target.


<details>
<summary>Bosses</summary>

![Bullkindar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/976a347b244c882ddbc13fbdfe247791a07a7e41.png)
![Pigmar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03aea806af20ceea894566d1ab91ca07761d1a76.png)
</details>
